medialive.channel.hlscdnsettings.HlsAkam.Docs: Sets up Akamai as the downstream system for the HLS output group.

medialive.channel.hlscdnsettings.HlsBasi.Docs: The settings for Basic Put for the HLS output.

medialive.channel.hlscdnsettings.HlsMedi.Docs: Sets up MediaStore as the destination for the HLS output.

medialive.channel.hlscdnsettings.HlsS3Se.Docs: Sets up Amazon S3 as the destination for this HLS output.

medialive.channel.hlscdnsettings.HlsWebd.Docs: The settings for Web VTT captions in the HLS output group.  The parent of this entity is HlsGroupSettings.
